§ 01Thank You

Thank you for thinking of Forhemit for {{companyName}}. We appreciate the opportunity to review this deal and value our relationship with you as a trusted referral partner.

§ 02Our Assessment

After careful review, this particular opportunity does not meet our current qualification criteria for an ESOP transition engagement.

Reason: {{declineReason}}

This is not a reflection on the quality of the business or your judgment as a broker. Our qualification criteria are specific to the ESOP structure and the financing constraints we work within.

§ 03What We Are Looking For

To help with future referrals, here is the profile of companies that are a strong fit for our ESOP program:

A.Owner-operated. The seller is actively involved in the business and motivated to transition ownership.
B.Revenue & profitability. At least $2M in annual revenue with positive, stable EBITDA.
C.Employee base. A minimum of 6 employees, with a management team that can operate post-transition.
D.Entity type. C-Corp (or LLC convertible to C-Corp) to qualify for the IRC §1042 tax election.
E.Clean cap table. Simple ownership structure with no complex investor or minority interest complications.
§ 04Keep Them Coming

We genuinely value our broker network and welcome future referrals. If you have other deals in your pipeline that fit the profile above, we would be glad to take a look. Even if a deal is not a perfect match, we are happy to have a preliminary conversation to explore options.

§ 05Referral Fee Reminder

Our referral arrangement remains in effect. A referral fee is payable on any deal that closes through our program, regardless of when the referral was made. We appreciate your continued partnership.

§ 06Contact

For questions or to discuss future referrals, please reach out:

deals@forhemit.com
{{ref}}
—Forhemit Transition Stewardship
